findings.description: `AppDbConnection` is referenced in s2 section content (in the consolidated note: "新たに`AppDbConnection#prepareStatement`を呼び出した場合は設定ファイルの値に戻る") but is absent from s2's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Both the fetchSize and queryTimeout notes in the source contain code examples using `AppDbConnection#prepareStatement` to illustrate that a new prepareStatement call resets to config file values.
